description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named sw that runs on push and pull request events across three jobs: windows, linux, and macos. For each job, check out the repository, use the egorpugin/sw-action, and upload the build artifact. On windows, run on a windows-2022 environment and build with default settings. On linux, run in a fedora:35 container on ubuntu-20.04, install flex and bison, and build with gcc. On macos, run on a matrix of os, install flex, bison, and gcc with brew, and build with gcc.
